daily_plan_req: Mei Lin teaches all core 10th-grade classes at Goethe Gymnasium starting at 8 am, finishes teaching at 1:30 pm, and evaluates student Kopfnoten.
name: Mei Lin
learned: Mei Lin is a high school teacher at Goethe Gymnasium teaching all core subjects to the 10th grade. She prepares students for their BLF exams and ensures strict adherence to standard traditional spelling and classroom discipline.
currently: Mei Lin is grading mock BLF exams, evaluating her students' Kopfnoten (behavior and diligence), and organizing the weekly 'Tag in der Praxis'.
lifestyle: Mei Lin goes to bed around 11pm, awakes up around 6am, eats dinner around 5pm.
daily_req: wake up and complete the morning routine at 6:00 am
teach 10th-grade German using traditional spelling rules at 9:45 am
evaluate Kopfnoten and grade BLF mock exams at home from 2:00 pm to 5:00 pm
